aweme_info.desc: War scares investors. But it’s never stopped the market long term. Every major conflict? The market recovered. Every single time. The real question isn’t *if* it recovers… it’s whether you stay invested long enough to see it. -Steve If you’re ready to start investing this year, don’t miss my next Beginner’s Investing Masterclass! original_client_text.markup_text:
War scares investors.

But it’s never stopped the market long term.

Every major conflict? The market recovered.

Every single time.

The real question isn’t *if* it recovers…

it’s whether you stay invested long enough to see it.

-Steve

If you’re ready to start investing this year, don’t miss my next Beginner’s Investing Masterclass! Sign up now - link in bio!

Follow @calltoleap
